case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BROWN, PAUL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, PAUL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-05-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER STPULATION.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-09-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-13-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-13-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-15-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-20-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-27-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-27-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-29-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, PAUL $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,026.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, PAUL
